text: I was told my package would arrive yesterday, but it’s still not here. This is really frustrating!
i cant log in. my account got locked.

I encountered a peculiar situation where my application keeps crashing unexpectedly whenever I attempt to upload files, despite having ample storage available. It's puzzling because I followed all the troubleshooting steps listed in the FAQ, including clearing the cache and ensuring the software is up to date. Any guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated, as I'm uncertain whether this is a problem on my end or if there are known issues with recent updates. Additionally, I have noticed that the upload feature sometimes displays error messages that seem unrelated to the actual file size or format. This entire experience has been quite frustrating, and I'm eager to resolve it promptly.

I can't believe my app keeps crashing! It just shuts down out of nowhere when I'm trying to get my work done. It’s so frustrating, and I’ve also tried restarting my phone and reinstalling it, but nothing works. What’s wrong with it?!

Could you provide clarification on the specific features included in your subscription package? I haven't found detailed information on certain aspects that may impact my decision to proceed. Thank you.
I'm getting an error when I try to sync my device, but it doesn't give a specific code or message.

I'm really curious, do you guys ever offer any special promotions or discounts for long-time customers, especially for those of us who have been around since the beginning? I've heard whispers but never seen anything official. It feels a little disappointing not knowing if there's something out there for loyal customers like me.
Hey, quick question. Do you guys have a feature where I can, like, schedule something for later? Also, I'm unsure if that's only for premium users or what. Thanks!

I recently discovered that my subscription was automatically renewed, despite having taken the necessary steps to cancel it last month. This situation is particularly frustrating as I had planned my budget around not having that charge occur. I would appreciate it if you could process a refund for the recent transaction and confirm that my account cancellation is indeed effective. Additionally, could you provide clarification on how I can prevent this from happening again in the future?
hey, do u guys have any discounts for students? like is there a special code or somethin?
The item I received is completely different from what was advertised. It doesn't fit my needs at all.
I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the product I purchased last month. It did not meet the quality I expected, and I would like to know how I can proceed with the complaint.
I can't belive my account got hacked! I'm super upset right now. Help me get it back, please!
I'm really frustrated because my software keeps crashing unexpectedly and I can't figure out why. I’ve tried reinstalling it but that hasn’t helped. It’s such a hassle!

I know I cancelled my subscription, but suddenly I see a charge on my statement? Can you reverse this? I thought everything was sorted out! It's a bit confusing. Like, did someone mess up on your end?
I received the wrong item and it's really disappointing. I just want a refund, not a replacement. Can you help with that?
